name: Mid-Cities
description_short: Members Choice Credit Union is a Houston-based NCUA-insured credit union offering competitive deposit rates, loans, and mortgages to qualifying members.
description_long:
Members Choice Credit Union operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving the Houston, Texas area and surrounding communities. The credit union has expanded its physical footprint with a recent branch opening in Lake Jackson, reflecting growth in its service territory. Like all credit unions, it is federally insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), providing deposit protection similar to FDIC insurance for banks.

The credit union offers a broad range of consumer financial products including high-yield checking accounts (Complete Checking earning up to 4.07% APY), money market accounts, certificates of deposit with promotional rates, personal loans, auto loans and refinancing, home equity loans, and mortgages. Their rate highlights prominently feature competitive deposit yields and loan rates positioned to attract members seeking better returns on savings and lower borrowing costs. The institution provides online banking, loan payment functionality, and member resources focused on financial education.

Members Choice differentiates itself through emphasis on member education and financial wellness, offering educational content on credit reports, credit scores, fraud protection, and personal finance topics for families. The credit union markets aggressively around high-yield deposit products and competitive loan rates, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional banks. Their messaging emphasizes personalized service and financial goal alignment, with staff available for mortgage consultations and loan applications.

As a credit union, Members Choice operates on the not-for-profit principle, theoretically returning profits to members through better rates rather than shareholders. However, like all credit unions, membership requirements and eligibility criteria apply—the website does not clearly detail these restrictions. The competitive rate environment means advertised rates are subject to change and may be promotional or time-limited, and actual approval depends on credit qualification. Consumers should verify current rates and membership eligibility requirements directly.
services: Complete Checking account with up to 4.07% APY
Money Market accounts (Maximum Money Market) with up to 2.27% APY
Certificates of Deposit with promotional rates (7-month and 14-month terms)
Auto loans and auto refinancing (rates as low as 3.24% APR)
Unsecured personal/signature loans (rates as low as 7.24% APR)
HomePlus personal loans (unsecured, 37-60 months, rates as low as 7.49% APR)
Mortgages for primary home purchase and refinance (rates as low as 5.74% APR)
Member Auto Center (online auto shopping and financing)
Online banking and loan payment processing
Financial education content (credit reports, credit scores, fraud protection, personal finance)
pros: High-yield checking account (Complete Checking) earning up to 4.07% APY with $0 minimum to open
Promotional 7-Month CD at 3.90% APY and 14-Month CD at 3.65% APY for savers
Auto loan rates as low as 3.24% APR for 12-36 month terms
Mortgage rates as low as 5.74% APR with online rate quotes (no credit pull required initially)
Personal loan options including unsecured signature loans and HomePlus loans starting at 7.24% APR
NCUA-insured deposits providing federal protection comparable to FDIC banking
Expanding branch network including new Lake Jackson location for member convenience
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not transparently detailed on website—potential barriers to joining
All advertised rates are subject to change without notice and appear to be promotional or time-limited
Limited information provided about actual qualification criteria, credit score requirements, or membership restrictions
Website does not clearly explain what defines membership eligibility or geographic service area boundaries
Personal loan rates of 7.24-7.49% APR are moderate but higher than auto loan rates, limiting appeal for general borrowing
best_for: Houston-area residents seeking high-yield savings accounts and CDs with competitive APY returns
Credit union members with good-to-excellent credit qualifying for auto loans under 3.5% APR
Homebuyers or refinancers in Texas looking for mortgage rates with no-pull preliminary quotes
Savers prioritizing NCUA insurance protection and not-for-profit member-owned financial institutions
diagnosis: Members Choice Credit Union is best for Houston-area residents and eligible members seeking competitive deposit yields, auto financing under 3.5% APR, or mortgages with transparent rate quoting. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is not transparently disclosed on the website, and all advertised rates are promotional, subject to change, and require credit qualification—consumers must verify current terms and eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Mid-Cities — NCUA-insured credit union in Compton, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
